title: Decision
description: What an agent returns at one decision step: per-instrument orders plus an optional free-text rationale. SharpeArena Agent Interface v1.0.

orders.description: Per-instrument instructions. May be empty (a hold).

reasoning.description: Free-text rationale captured into the trajectory. Optional; defaults to empty.

action.description: Discrete action label (sizing is carried by target_weight).

target_weight.description: Target portfolio weight for this symbol, signed for shorts.

confidence.description: Stated conviction in [0, 1], scored for calibration. Optional; defaults to 0.5.

rationale.description: Optional one-line rationale for this order. Defaults to empty.
